headline: Oil Crosses $80 Again: Can ExxonMobil's Upstream Business Thrive?
summary: XOM's Permian outlook strengthens as WTI tops $80, far above $34-$42 shut-in prices, while production targets continue to rise.

headline: Here’s What Hurt ConocoPhillips’ (COP) in Q2
summary: Harris Oakmark recently released its second-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Oakmark Fund”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The objective of the fund is to deliver capital appreciation by investing in a diverse set of large-cap US companies. In the quarter, the Fund (investor class) underperformed the S&P 500 Index, returning […]

headline: The Hidden Winners Inside SCHD - July 2026
summary: SCHD has returned just under 2% in the past month, outperforming the S&P 500 ETF SPY by almost 100 bps. Read more on SCHD's holdings here.
